name: Fallout: New Vegas
description: Goodsprings starting area for Fallout: New Vegas. Ships with the Chasm Bridge FNV mod: the Goodsprings NPC roster as character cards, a unified Mojave/Goodsprings lorebook, the FNV action and quest books, and the generated entity/item spawn catalogs. Drop this folder into chasm (or let the mod copy it in) and the Goodsprings cast comes to life.
comment: Authored game content only. No chat logs, conversation history, live-chat state, voices, embeddings, or save-sync snapshots are bundled — those are per-user runtime data created by chasm on first use. Voice references/clones are configured in chasm, not shipped here.
